title: Shape of You
why_this_song: Shape of You by Ed Sheeran (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Grab on my waist and put that body on me""
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Come on, be my baby, come on"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Come on now, follow my lead"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Come on now, follow my lead"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm in love with the shape of you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "body" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "body" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: So the bar is where I go
Every day discovering something brand new
Oh, I'm in love with your body

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Drinking fast, and then we talk slow
Come, come on now, follow my lead
Come on, be my baby, come on

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ed Sheeran one question about "Shape of You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ed Sheeran sobre "Shape of You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Shape of You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Shape of You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Shape of You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Shape of You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
